name: French Sables
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and sugar until smooth.
2. Add the egg yolk and vanilla; beat thoroughly.
3. Combine the flour and salt. Mix into the butter mixture to form a smooth dough.
4. Shape the dough into cylinders about 1-2 inches in diameter on a lightly floured surface.
5. Wrap the dough in waxed paper or plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least one hour.
6. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
7. Brush chilled logs with beaten egg.
8. Roll each log in chopped crystalline sugar.
9. Slice the dough into rounds about 1/3-inch thick using a sharp knife.
10. Place the slices, 1 inch apart, on a parchment-covered baking sheet.
11. Bake for approximately 10 minutes or until slightly colored around the edges.
Yield: Approximately 4 dozen Sables
